content: Curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods (ICM, RND) and state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be crossbred into a 'curiosity-gated episodic memory architecture', where intrinsic curiosity signals dynamically prune and prioritize which novel experiences get stored in long-term episodic agent memory. This architecture eliminates the common problem of memory bloat in large open-ended exploration tasks by only retaining experiences that trigger sustained prediction error, the core signal of existing curiosity methods.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
